macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Holds Near 6,900 Amid Iran Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed essentially flat on Monday (up 0.04%) following US and Israel attacks on Iran over the weekend, holding below the key 6,900 pivot point. Traders are bracing for continued volatility as the geopolitical situation evolves.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge on Iran Strikes
items.summary: Oil markets surged in response to the US and Israel military actions against Iran over the weekend, reflecting geopolitical risk premium in energy markets.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Rises Amid Altcoin Lows and ETH/BTC Stagnation
items.summary: The crypto market is experiencing an upward movement today, with live updates noting the ETH/BTC pair stuck at key levels and nearly 38% of altcoins trading near record lows. Potential reasons include factors shaping a March 2026 rally.

items.title: Analysts Recommend Buying Zcash, Ethereum After 2026 Pullbacks
items.summary: Zcash, down nearly 60% in 2026, is highlighted as a buy for its privacy-enhanced Bitcoin-like store of value features, while Ethereum, down over 30%, anticipates major upgrades to boost network value. Bitcoin recovery may hinge on ETF inflows.

items.title: Shiba Inu Layer-2 Network Shows Minimal Activity
items.summary: Shibarium, Shiba Inu's Layer-2 network, captured only $2 in fees on February 24, indicating no significant activity or token burning to reduce supply and support price.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Kempner Institute Demonstrates AI Evolution Without Training
items.summary: Researchers at the Kempner Institute show that intelligent behaviors can emerge in artificial agents through evolution in virtual environments, without predefined goals or human-provided data. This approach highlights how sensory information and environmental scale enable evolutionary AI development.

items.title: Canada Funds AI Enhancements for Alberta Drone Company
items.summary: The Government of Canada announced support on March 2, 2026, for Landing Zones Canada to develop AI and machine learning technologies in Remotely Piloted Aircraft Systems, focusing on sustainable weather data collection drones.

items.title: CEOs Rank AI as Top Business Risk Surpassing Geopolitics
items.summary: For the first time, 60% of Fortune 500 CEOs identify AI as the greatest risk to their industries, ahead of geopolitical issues, with Fed officials cautioning on job displacement and adjustment costs similar to past technological shifts.

items.title: Machine Learning Advances Non-Targeted Detection of Environmental Pollutants
items.summary: A new review in Artificial Intelligence & Environment details how ML models predict mass spectra, infer structures, and enable standard-free quantification of organic pollutants using high-resolution mass spectrometry.

items.title: MSPs Optimistic on AI Opportunities for 2026 Amid Pricing Challenges
items.summary: Managed service providers anticipate massive growth from AI tools like Microsoft Copilot and ChatGPT, focusing on IT consulting and security, though AI pricing remains experimental due to profitability issues.

items.title: ZTE Showcases Full-Stack AI Innovations at MWC Barcelona 2026
items.summary: ZTE highlights AI integration in connectivity, cloud, home devices, and personal gadgets, demonstrating deep AI-ICT fusion across four core areas.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: World of Warcraft: Midnight Expansion Launches Today
items.summary: Blizzard's 11th major expansion for World of Warcraft, set in Quel’Thalas with new progression systems and Void invasion narrative, releases on PC March 3, expected to boost subscriptions.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Adds Final Fantasy 3 and Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 Today
items.summary: Xbox Game Pass kicks off March with Final Fantasy 3 and Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 joining on March 3, followed by Planet of Lana 2 on March 5 and Nova Roma on March 26.

items.title: Nintendo Announces Indie World Showcase for March 3
items.summary: Nintendo will air a 15-minute Indie World showcase on March 3 at 2pm GMT, featuring upcoming indie games for Switch systems, with a longer Japanese version planned.

items.title: Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered Releases March 3
items.summary: The remastered cult-classic action-adventure game from 2003 launches March 3 on PS4, PS5, and other platforms with upgraded visuals and refined controls.

items.title: Bungie’s Marathon Extraction Shooter Launches March 5
items.summary: Bungie returns to competitive shooters with Marathon, a sci-fi extraction title emphasizing gunplay and seasonal content, releasing March 5 amid a crowded genre.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 Enters Early Access March 5
items.summary: The sequel to the influential deck-building roguelike launches in Early Access on March 5 with new characters, expanded systems, and deeper mechanics.

items.title: Scott Pilgrim EX Arrives on Switch March 4
items.summary: The new brawler Scott Pilgrim EX launches March 4 on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, featuring 4-player co-op, stylish combos, and music by Anamanaguchi.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Nvidia Invests $4 Billion in Optical Networking and Expands into 6G
items.summary: Nvidia announced a $4 billion investment in photonics partners including Lumentum and Coherent for advanced laser and optical networking components, while separately partnering with telecom companies to advance 6G technology with AI-native network designs.

items.title: Apple Announces iPhone 17e and M4 iPad Air Ahead of March 4 Event
items.summary: Apple unveiled the iPhone 17e with an A19 chip and upgraded MagSafe wireless charging, along with an M4 iPad Air featuring 30% faster performance and new connectivity options including Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6, with additional announcements expected at a March 4 event.

items.title: Viettel Showcases 5G Open RAN and Next-Generation Connectivity at MWC 2026
items.summary: Viettel Group displayed its 5G Open RAN infrastructure, zero-trust consumer services, and next-generation connectivity solutions at Mobile World Congress, while signing cooperation agreements with Qualcomm on 5G Advanced and 6G technologies.

items.title: Huawei Launches 22 Industrial Intelligence Solutions at MWC 2026
items.summary: Huawei released 115 industrial intelligence showcases and announced 22 new industrial intelligence solutions across multiple sectors including electric power, manufacturing, retail, and finance, while upgrading its SHAPE 2.0 partner framework with AI integration.

items.title: COMPUTEX 2026 Opens with Focus on AI Computing, Robotics, and Next-Gen Technology
items.summary: COMPUTEX 2026 in Taipei launched with the theme 'AI Together,' featuring major brands like ASUS, Intel, and Foxconn showcasing integrated AI systems, robotics advancements, and end-to-end computing solutions spanning chip design to data center infrastructure.

items.title: uCloudlink Unveils Strategic Roadmap at MWC 2026 for Global Connectivity and IoT
items.summary: uCloudlink Group presented its strategic roadmap at Mobile World Congress focusing on global connectivity, IoT, and pet tech opportunities, leveraging its CloudSIM and AI HyperConn technologies for zero-infrastructure network scaling.
